name: Hathor
subtitle: Full Correspondences
flowText: Hathor embodies earth mother, nurture — under Venus · Saturn; in Taurus, Cancer.

related.name: Danu
related.teaser: Danu embodies earth mother, nurture — under Venus · Saturn; in Taurus, Cancer.

related.name: Isis
related.teaser: Isis embodies earth mother, nurture — under Venus · Saturn; in Taurus, Cancer.

related.name: Ceres
related.teaser: Ceres embodies earth, grain, abundance — under Saturn · Venus; in Taurus, Virgo.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: ♀ Venus
related.teaser: Venus is the rose of harmony — magnetic union, pulse of beauty, lover’s path.

related.name: Freyr
related.teaser: Freyr embodies fertility, love, prosperity — under Venus; in Taurus.

related.name: Freyja
related.teaser: Freyja embodies fertility, love, prosperity — under Venus; in Taurus.

related.name: Jarilo
related.teaser: Jarilo embodies spring, descent and return — under Venus; in Virgo, Pisces.

related.name: Persephone
related.teaser: Persephone embodies spring, descent and return — under Venus; in Virgo, Pisces.

related.name: Proserpina
related.teaser: Proserpina embodies spring, descent and return — under Venus; in Virgo, Pisces.

related.name: Cernunnos
related.teaser: Cernunnos embodies wild nature, panic, fertility — under Pan/Nature; in Capricorn.

related.name: Inari
related.teaser: Inari embodies hunt, fields, plenty — under Moon; in Sagittarius, Virgo.
